subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Render praise unto God that thou art confirmed in servitude to His sacred Threshold and steadfast in His Covenant and Testament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان حمد کن خدا را که بعبودیت آستان مقدس موفقی و بثبوت بر عهد و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
